subject: Right trigger feels loose
description: Player reported right trigger feeling mechanically loose during extended gameplay sessions.
resolution: Resolved with firmware update to v2.94. Trigger sensitivity recalibrated.

subject: Controller disconnecting intermittently
description: Player reported controller losing Bluetooth connection every 20-30 minutes during gameplay.
resolution: Resolved by USB reset and re-pairing procedure. Advised player to update firmware.

subject: Controller not recognized by PS5
description: Player reported PS5 console not detecting controller over USB during startup.
resolution: Resolved by firmware reinstall via USB recovery mode.
